title: How to size a signet ring (fast, no guesswork)
excerpt: A quick sizing method that avoids returns and keeps your stack comfortable.

sections.heading: Use a ring you already own
sections.body: Measure the inner diameter of a ring that fits the target finger. Match that measurement to a sizing chart.

sections.heading: Comfort matters
sections.body: If your ring sits at the base of the finger, choose a slightly looser fit. For the middle/upper finger, a snugger fit prevents spinning.

sections.heading: Stacking tip
sections.body: If you stack multiple rings, sizes can feel tighter. Consider going up half a size on the anchor ring.

cta.heading: Lock the stack with a signet.
cta.body: Choose your size and add it to the cart — drop quantities are limited.
